name: design-system-generator
description: From a website URL: scrape the live site for REAL brand colours and fonts (filtering WordPress/Gutenberg default-palette noise), then build an elevated-but-recognizable single-file HTML design system — hero, logo, colour, type, spacing, buttons, tags, stats, cards, 1-2 signature components, pricing table, callout, voice, and a proposal bridge — preview it locally and deploy to Netlify under a clean subdomain. The repeatable B2B Global client design-system flow (built for Karno Energy and Codelibry).
